MS.S: * General availability for module Az.DeviceRegistry_x000D__x000A_* GA stable release of API version 2025-10-01 for Az.DeviceRegistry. New updates include:_x000D__x000A_ - Schema and Schema Version asynchronous delete. No longer synchronous._x000D__x000A_ - Namespace Asset and Namespace Discovered Asset EventGroups._x000D__x000A_ - Namespace Device x509 certificate authentication now supports intermediate certificates and key secret names.

* General availability for module Az.DeviceRegistry_x000D__x000A_* GA stable release of API version 2025-10-01 for Az.DeviceRegistry. New updates include:_x000D__x000A_ - Schema and Schema Version asynchronous delete. No longer synchronous._x000D__x000A_ - Namespace Asset and Namespace Discovered Asset EventGroups._x000D__x000A_ - Namespace Device x509 certificate authentication now supports intermediate certificates and key secret names.
